creator: freebsd@phil.spodhuis.org
text:
This is still happening with FreeBSD 10.0; `src` is in `Components`, `IgnorePaths` is empty, other files in `/usr/src` get updated, only `/usr/src/UPDATING` is being skipped.

With 10.0 up to -p6, and <http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=267829> showing that `releng/10.0/UPDATING` is being modified upstream, the last entry in `/usr/src/UPDATING` on this box is from "20131223".
